{{Quote|Glynn-Beti is a Jedi Master, and a fearless warrior. Also a shrewd one.|[[Xeran]]|<ref name="Boba Fett: A New Threat">''[[Boba Fett: A New Threat]]''</ref>}}
'''Glynn-Beti''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]], Glynn-Beti was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually ascending to the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Taking on the young [[Ulu Ulix]] as her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], both were called upon to take up ranks in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] when the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] went to [[Clone Wars/Legends|war]].<ref name="BFC" />

Master Glynn-Beti and her Padawan joined [[CT-4/619]] in [[Conquest of Raxus Prime|battling]] for [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]]. There, the Jedi discovered [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], leader of the CIS, attempting to harness the powers of a construct known as the [[Force Harvester]]. While the Jedi were unable to capture Dooku, they destroyed the potential weapon and sabotaged the [[Dark Reaper campaign]]. Discovering the orphaned [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] during the battle, Master Glynn-Beti failed to recognize the dangerous child and had him shipped to [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] to be placed with a local family there. However, Fett managed to [[Escape from Bespin|escape]], joining forces with the notorious [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]], a failed Jedi Glynn-Beti detested.<ref name="BFC" />

Master Glynn-Beti was present on Bespin to [[Battle of Bespin (Clone Wars)|defend]] it from Separatist invasion. However, the best she could do was assist with an evacuation of [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]].<ref name="The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: Tethan Battle Adventure">''[[The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: Tethan Battle Adventure]]''</ref>

Glynn-Beti and Boba Fett would once more cross paths when she led the campaign known as the [[Battle of Xagobah (Clone Wars)|Battle of Xagobah]]. During the battle she thanked the mysterious Fett when he saved the life of Padawan Ulix, stating she was in his debt. In payment of that debt, Master Glynn-Beti assisted Fett in infiltrating the [[Mazariyan]] Citadel as part of the overall mission to capture one of the Confederacy's leaders, [[Wat Tambor/Legends|Wat Tambor]].<ref name="Boba Fett: A New Threat" />
